data.name: AppendByteConfirmationString
data.value: 您已到达文件末尾。是否要追加一个字节？如果继续，此操作将无法取消。

data.name: CancelLongProcessToolTipString
data.value: 单击以取消长时间进程。

data.name: CopyAsTBLString
data.value: TBL 字符串（已加载字符文件）

data.name: FileDroppingConfirmationString
data.value: 是否要关闭当前文件并打开：

data.name: PasteExtendByteConfirmationString
data.value: 粘贴操作已到达文件末尾。是否要扩展文件以完成操作？如果继续，此操作将无法取消。

data.name: ThisStringAreNotHexString
data.value: 此字符串不是十六进制

data.name: HighLightSettingString
data.value: 高亮显示所有找到的数据

data.name: ReplaceTrimSettingString
data.value: 替换时将数据修剪到查找长度

data.name: ConvertStringToLongErrorString
data.value: 无法将此字符串转换为 long

data.name: OpenAsReadOnlyString
data.value: 文件已锁定。是否要以只读模式打开它？

data.name: StatusFoundMatchesFormat
data.value: 在 {1} 毫秒内找到 {0} 个匹配项

data.name: StatusMatchFoundAtFormat
data.value: 在位置 0x{0:X8} 找到匹配项

data.name: StatusFoundMatchesWithSpeedFormat
data.value: 在 {1} 毫秒内找到 {0} 个匹配项 ({2:F2} MB/s)

data.name: StatusMatchFoundAtWrappedFormat
data.value: 在位置 0x{0:X8} 找到匹配项（已回绕）

data.name: StatusMatchOfTotalFormat
data.value: 匹配项 {0}（共 {1} 个）位于位置 0x{2:X8}

data.name: StatusReplacedAtFormat
data.value: 在位置 0x{0:X8} 已替换（总计：{1}）

data.name: StatusReplacedOccurrencesFormat
data.value: 已替换 {0} 处。总替换次数：{1}

data.name: StatusNoMoreBookmarksAfter
data.value: 当前位置后没有更多书签

data.name: StatusNoMoreBookmarksBefore
data.value: 当前位置前没有更多书签

data.name: BookmarkNavigatedFormat
data.value: 导航到位于 0x{0:X8} 的书签

data.name: ProgressMessageReplacingFormat
data.value: 找到 {0} 个匹配项。正在替换...

data.name: FillWithByteTooltipString
data.value: 用特定字节值填充选区

data.name: ReplaceByteTooltipString
data.value: 将一个字节的所有出现替换为另一个

data.name: ReverseSelectionTooltipString
data.value: 反转选区中的字节顺序（字节序转换）

data.name: InvertSelectionTooltipString
data.value: 反转每个字节中的所有位（与 0xFF 进行 XOR）

data.name: TblEditor_Title
data.comment: TBL Editor - Title

data.name: TblEditor_NoTblLoaded
data.value: 未加载TBL文件。请先加载TBL文件。
data.comment: TBL Editor - NoTblLoaded

data.name: TblEditor_UnsavedChanges
data.value: 您有未保存的更改。是否在关闭前保存?
data.comment: TBL Editor - UnsavedChanges

data.comment: TBL Editor - ConfirmDelete

data.comment: TBL Editor - DuplicateEntry

data.comment: Hex editor settings - Show line numbers (disabled)

data.comment: Hex editor settings - Line numbers tooltip

data.comment: Hex editor settings - Show byte tooltip checkbox

data.comment: Hex editor settings - Bytes per line label

data.comment: Hex editor settings - Zoom scale label

data.comment: Hex editor settings - Allow insert anywhere checkbox

data.comment: Hex editor settings - Allow delete byte checkbox

data.name: HexSettings_Editing_ExtendFile
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Allow extend file checkbox

data.name: HexSettings_Editing_AppendConfirmation
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Append needs confirmation checkbox

data.name: HexSettings_Editing_EditMode
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Edit mode label

data.name: HexSettings_Editing_Overwrite
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Overwrite mode option

data.name: HexSettings_Editing_Insert
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Insert mode option

data.name: HexSettings_Editing_CaretMode
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Caret mode label

data.name: HexSettings_Clipboard_DefaultCopyMode
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Default copy mode label

data.comment: Hex editor settings - Hex string copy mode option

data.comment: Hex editor settings - Byte array copy mode option

data.comment: Hex editor settings - C# code copy mode option

data.comment: Hex editor settings - VB code copy mode option

data.comment: Hex editor settings - C code copy mode option

data.comment: Hex editor settings - Java code copy mode option

data.comment: Hex editor settings - Allow file drop checkbox

data.comment: Hex editor settings - File dropping confirmation checkbox

data.name: HexSettings_DragDrop_TextDrop
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Allow text drop checkbox

data.name: HexSettings_Highlight_AutoHighlight
data.value: 自动突出显示选定字节
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Auto-highlight selection byte checkbox

data.name: HexSettings_Highlight_AutoSelect
data.value: 自动选择相同字节（双击）
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Auto-select same byte on double-click checkbox

data.name: HexSettings_Highlight_MarkerNavigation
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Allow marker click navigation checkbox

data.name: HexSettings_Highlight_Color
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Auto-highlight color label

data.name: HexSettings_Search_ParallelSearch
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Enable parallel search checkbox

data.name: HexSettings_Search_WildcardSearch
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Use wildcard search checkbox

data.name: HexSettings_Search_HighlightMatches
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Highlight all matches checkbox

data.name: HexSettings_Search_ResultLimit
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Search result limit label

data.name: HexSettings_Statistics_ByteCount
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Allow byte count checkbox

data.name: HexSettings_Advanced_ByteShift
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Byte shift left label

data.name: HexSettings_Advanced_SaveState
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Save current state button

data.name: HexSettings_Advanced_LoadState
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Load saved state button

data.name: HexSettings_Display_ShowLineNumbers_ToolTip
data.value: 此功能在 V2 中尚不可用

data.name: HexSettings_Highlight_AutoSelectDoubleClick
data.value: 自动选择相同字节（双击）

data.name: HexSettings_ScrollMarkers_Title
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Scroll Markers category header

data.name: HexSettings_ShowBookmarkMarkers
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Toggle bookmark markers on scrollbar

data.name: HexSettings_ShowModifiedMarkers
data.comment: Hex editor settings - Toggle modified byte markers on scrollbar

data.comment: Hex editor settings - Toggle inserted byte markers on scrollbar

data.comment: Hex editor settings - Toggle deleted byte markers on scrollbar

data.comment: Hex editor settings - Toggle search result markers on scrollbar

data.comment: Hex editor settings - Bar Chart category header

data.name: HexSettings_BarChart_PanelVisibility
data.comment: Bar Chart - Show/hide the bar chart panel

data.name: HexSettings_BarChart_BarColor
data.comment: Bar Chart - Color of the frequency bars

data.name: HexSettings_BarChart_BackgroundColor
data.comment: Bar Chart - Background color of the chart panel

data.name: HexSettings_BarChart_TextColor
data.comment: Bar Chart - Color for labels and statistics text

data.name: HexSettings_BarChart_PanelHeight
data.comment: Bar Chart - Height of the chart panel in pixels

data.name: HexSettings_BarChart_ShowAxisLabels
data.comment: Bar Chart - Display byte value labels (00-FF)

data.name: HexSettings_BarChart_ShowGridLines
data.comment: Bar Chart - Display horizontal reference grid lines

data.name: HexSettings_BarChart_ShowStatistics
data.comment: Bar Chart - Display statistics overlay (Total, Max, Entropy)

data.name: RelativeSearchString
data.value: 相对搜索 - 编码发现

data.name: RelativeSearchTblLoadedString
data.value: TBL 已加载：{0} 个条目（将用于验证）

data.name: RelativeSearchNoTblString
data.value: 未加载 TBL（建议独立评分）

data.name: RelativeSearchSearchingString
data.value: 正在搜索 256 个编码偏移量...

data.name: RelativeSearchFoundProposalsString
data.value: 在 {1} ms 内找到 {0} 个建议

data.name: RelativeSearchFoundWithValidationString
data.value: 在 {1} ms 内找到 {0} 个建议（最佳匹配已通过加载的 TBL 验证！）

data.name: RelativeSearchSearchingWithTblString
data.value: 正在搜索 256 个偏移量（针对 {0} 个 TBL 条目进行验证）...

data.name: RelativeSearchNoProposalsString
data.value: 未找到编码建议。请尝试不同的搜索文本。

data.name: RelativeSearchKnownTextTooltipString
data.value: 输入您知道出现在 ROM 中的文本（例如"World"、"Start"、"Hero"）

data.name: RelativeSearchExportTooltipString
data.value: 将所选编码建议另存为 TBL 文件

data.name: PatternAnalysis_HighEntropyDesc
data.value: 数据似乎已被压缩或加密

data.name: PatternAnalysis_LowEntropyDesc
data.value: 数据包含许多重复或相似的字节

data.name: PatternAnalysis_SkewedDesc
data.value: 一个字节值出现超过 20% 的时间

data.name: FileStats_CompressedOrEncrypted
data.value: 可能是压缩或加密的数据

data.name: ArchiveStructure_ExtractFunctionality
data.value: 提取功能 - 将通过存档库实现

data.name: FileComparison_SelectBothFiles
data.value: 选择两个要比较的文件

data.name: CustomTemplate_ApplyDescription
data.value: 应用此模板以解析十六进制编辑器中当前加载的文件。

data.name: CustomTemplate_ApplyingTemplate
data.value:
正在将模板"{0}"应用到当前文件。
这将根据您的模板定义解析 {1} 个块。
注意：与 HexEditor 的完全集成需要连接到主视图模型。

data.name: Search_Error_NoTBLLoaded
data.value: 未加载 TBL。无法搜索 TBL 文本。

data.name: Search_Error_NoTBLForReplacement
data.value: 未加载 TBL。无法在 TBL TEXT 模式下编码替换字节。

data.name: Search_ExportDialog_Filter
data.value: CSV 文件 (*.csv)|*.csv|文本文件 (*.txt)|*.txt|JSON 文件 (*.json)|*.json

data.name: Search_EncodingApplied_Message
data.value: 编码已应用！现在可以使用 TBL TEXT 模式。

data.name: IPS_Error_NoFileOpen
data.value: 请在应用补丁前先打开 ROM 文件。

data.name: IPS_ApplyPatch_Title
data.value: 选择 IPS 补丁文件

data.name: IPS_FileDialog_Filter
data.value: IPS 补丁文件 (*.ips)|*.ips|所有文件 (*.*)|*.*

data.name: IPS_Error_InvalidFile
data.value: 选择的文件不是有效的 IPS 补丁。

data.name: IPS_CreatePatch_NoFileOpen
data.value: 请先打开修改后的 ROM 文件。

data.name: IPS_CreatePatch_SelectOriginal_Title
data.value: 选择原始（未修改的）ROM 文件

data.name: IPS_CreatePatch_SaveDialog_Title
data.value: 将 IPS 补丁另存为

data.name: TruncateReplacementString
data.value: 将替换截断为查找长度

data.name: HE_LoadTblTooltip
data.value: Load a TBL file (ROM character table)

data.name: HE_TipSearchAllOccurrences
data.value: 使用进度叠加搜索所有匹配项

data.name: HexEditor_SplitView_Tooltip
data.value: 打开或关闭同步的第二个 Hex 面板
